title: C.A.D. Pack
description: Creates compatibility for using some kitchen items from Adorn, Farmer's Delight, and Cluttered with Cooking For Blockheads
body: A simple datapack that adds compatibility for the kitchen style items from various mods to Cooking For Blockheads.  Now those pretty cabinets, counters and similar items from Cluttered, Adorn, and Farmer's Delight will work with your Cooking For Blockheads multiblock kitchen
